mode.description: Leader election mode: builtin (default) or disabled. Use disabled only for single-replica deployments. For zen-lead integration, use disabled mode and configure zen-lead separately.

electionID.description: Leader election ID (defaults to component-leader-election if empty)

enabled.description: Controls whether CRDs are installed with this chart. Default: true (for convenience). Set to false for production/GitOps to avoid uninstall risks.

trustedProxyCIDRs.description: Trusted proxy CIDRs for X-Forwarded-For/X-Real-IP header validation. Empty list means proxy headers are never trusted.

maxRequestBytes.description: Maximum request body size in bytes (default: 1MiB). Prevents DoS attacks.

authToken.description: Token-based authentication for webhook endpoints. When set, requests must include Authorization: Bearer <token>. Use authTokenSecret for production (recommended).

authTokenSecret.description: Secret reference for authToken (recommended for production)

name.description: Secret name containing the webhook auth token

key.description: Key within the secret containing the webhook auth token

allowedIPs.description: IP allowlist for webhook endpoints. Can be used as an alternative to token authentication, or in combination with it.

authDisabled.description: SECURITY WARNING: Disable authentication (NOT RECOMMENDED for production). Set to true only if you explicitly want to disable webhook authentication. This should only be used in development/testing environments. Default: false (authentication required by default).

items.description: Additional environment variable (escape hatch for custom configuration)

value.description: Environment variable value (use valueFrom for secrets)

extraEnv.description: Additional environment variables (escape hatch for custom configuration). Example: [{"name": "CUSTOM_VAR", "value": "custom-value"}]

defaultTTLDays.description: Default TTL for observations in days. Observations older than this will be automatically deleted.

defaultTTLSeconds.description: Alternative: specify TTL in seconds (takes precedence over defaultTTLDays if both are set)

gcInterval.description: Garbage collection interval (how often GC runs). Format: Go duration (e.g., '30m', '1h', '2h')

gcTimeout.description: Garbage collection timeout (maximum time for a single GC run). Format: Go duration (e.g., '5m', '10m')

enabled.description: Enable PrometheusRule resource creation for zen-watcher alerts
